headline: Can Investment Income Cushion Premium Pressure for RNR's Q2 Earnings?
summary: RNR heads into Q2 earnings with upward estimate revisions, a positive Earnings ESP and a four-quarter beat streak. Will investment income offset premium pressure?

raw.headline: Can Investment Income Cushion Premium Pressure for RNR's Q2 Earnings?

headline: Will Chubb Limited Deliver an Earnings Beat in the Second Quarter?
summary: CB is expected to have posted higher Q2 revenues and earnings, supported by premium growth, investment income and underwriting discipline despite catastrophe losses.

raw.headline: Will Chubb Limited Deliver an Earnings Beat in the Second Quarter?
raw.summary: CB is expected to have posted higher Q2 revenues and earnings, supported by premium growth, investment income and underwriting discipline despite catastrophe losses.

headline: Travelers Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Lower Catastrophe Losses
summary: TRV tops Q2 earnings estimates as lower catastrophe losses, stronger investment income and underwriting gains lift profits despite a revenue miss.

raw.headline: Travelers Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Lower Catastrophe Losses
